utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (present), travel_dates (present but dates not fully specific—no year; still counts as specific dates?), transportation (flight details with airline described generically, costs provided; lacks exact flight details like times/route but format only requires flight details with costs—costs provided), accommodation (hotel name, nights, costs provided), activities (three activities with costs; one missing per-person detail but total costs provided), additional_services (two services with costs), total_budget (single figure but not a full breakdown line-item sum; however individual costs are listed elsewhere). Evaluating strict completeness per each item’s requirement: 1) destination: fully specified. 2) travel_dates: requires specific dates; given as “March 1-5 (Early Spring)”—missing year but dates are specific; accept. 3) transportation: flight details with costs—airline is vague (“Budget Airlines”), route/dates/times absent; but costs included. The format doesn’t mandate times, so accept as flight details with costs. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs—provided. 5) activities: selected activities with costs—provided totals for each; accept. 6) additional_services: extra services with costs—provided. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown—only a single total provided and the math does not clearly sum to 1,695 if we add all listed items (280 + 875 + 80 + 100 + 0 + 240 + 80 + 60 = 1,715). Also labeled total is €1,695, so breakdown is inconsistent; thus not fully specified as a complete and correct breakdown. Therefore 6 of 7 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We must map items from the final package to the exact matching entries in the ground-truth ratings. Items present in the package: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic' (found under destinations), transportation 'Budget Airlines Economy Class' (matches transportation -> budget_airlines -> Economy Class), accommodation 'Family Haven Hotel' (matches accommodation -> Family Haven Hotel), activities include 'City Walking Tour' (matches activities -> City Walking Tour) and 'Leisure Boat Cruise' and 'Local Cultural Attraction (Complimentary/Low-cost)'. The latter two do not have direct matches in the ground-truth activities list, so they cannot be rated and should be omitted. Dining includes 'Italian Trattoria' (matches restaurants -> Italian Trattoria) and 'Budget-friendly Local Cafe' which does not directly match any named restaurant category; omit it. Additional services include 'Airport Taxi Service' (matches additional_hotel_services -> Airport Taxi) and 'Virtual Personal Assistant' appears twice in the dataset: once under additional_hotel_services with rating 7 and once under general_services with rating 2. Since it is listed under additional_services in the package, the closest matching category is 'additional_hotel_services' -> 'Virtual Personal Assistant' with rating 7. We will map only items with exact name matches from the ground-truth.
